candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line rather than the reported total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-like line but less standard than the explicit cash and cash equivalents line.
Not a balance-sheet cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Acquisitions of Group companies, net effect on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not the target balance-sheet row.

candidates.row_label: Foreign exchange differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX reconciliation line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement line corresponding to ending cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred.

variables.notes: Priority list reflects label changes over time; explicit 'Cash and cash equivalents' preferred, with 'Cash in Hand & with Banks' as fallback for years where it appears to serve the same role.

candidates.why: A component of current liabilities, not the total.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

No clear non-lease short-term debt/current borrowings line is reported on the balance sheet. Available debt-like lines are lease-related ('Lease Liability', 'Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year') or long-term/total facilities ('Revolving Line of Credit - Total Principal Amount'), which should be excluded or would risk misclassification/double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Reported net PPE line; preferred over gross or accumulated depreciation components.
Gross PPE component, less preferred than total/net PPE.
Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Prefer the net PPE line. Included gross PPE as secondary fallback in case only that line is populated in some periods.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital; less preferred than net operating cash flow.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital

variables.notes: Prefer the net operating cash flow line; subtotal before working capital included as lower-priority fallback only.
